title: 704k Equity Curve Perfectly Replicating a High Volume Breakout Pattern
author: MasterpieceSolid2505
selftext:
Today was a Masterclass in Volume Precedes Price as seen in my YTD balance vs the pattern Take a look at these two images On the left is my portfolio equity curve 704k balance +42k Today On the right is a textbook example of a high-volume breakout pattern My account curve is basically a flawless mirror image of this technical setup

The Accumulation Phase Image 1 Early Flat Curve Before today my account was grinding sideways If you map this to the candlestick chart Image 2 this is the quiet period where volume is low and price is compressing within a tight range This is where smart money is quiet The Volume Confirmation The Buy Arrow The critical moment in Image 2 is the big green candle coinciding with that massive spike in volume at the green arrow This isnt random its institutional aggression This volume burst confirms the pattern The Breakout Image 1 Vertical Spike As seen on my equity curve the momentum was instantaneous When price successfully accepts above resistance with that kind of volume behind it volatility expands That massive vertical line at the end of my YTD curve is the result of catching that exact breakout

Stop hunting for hype Master the simple quantification of market emotion Volume 📈🥂
